name: fh-meta
description: Hub meta-engineering toolkit — 29 skills + 3 agents. New in 1.2.0: pipeline-conductor (4-pipeline gated sweep), return-path-gate (chain closure audit), goal-quench (Stop hook + quality gate), steel-quench Wave 5 (multi-model sidecar challenger), 2-layer architecture docs, YAML validation script. Validated cross-CLI: Claude Code, Codex, Gemini.
